title: Crystal Infused Two-Tone Bracelet with Pyrite & Black Obsidian
short_description: A dainty two-tone bar-link bracelet strung with natural Pyrite and Black Obsidian beads — grounding crystal energy in a gold-and-silver everyday piece.
body_html:
Meet the everyday bracelet that carries a little more meaning. The Crystal Infused Two-Tone Bracelet pairs a delicate gold-tone and silver-tone bar-link chain with hand-set natural Pyrite and Black Obsidian beads — a quiet mix of shine and grounding.

The slim, lightweight chain sits close to the wrist so it layers effortlessly with your watch or other bracelets, while the mixed metallic links let it work with both your gold and silver jewellery. Pyrite brings a warm golden glow long associated with confidence and abundance; Black Obsidian adds a deep, glassy shine long loved for its grounding, protective energy.

  • Two-tone finish — gold-tone and silver-tone bar links in one chain
  • Natural crystal beads — real Pyrite and Black Obsidian stones
  • Secure lobster clasp with an extender chain for an adjustable fit
  • Skin-friendly, lightweight build made for all-day wear

Wear it solo for a subtle finish or stack it up — either way it stays comfortable from morning meetings to evening plans. Also available as a Pack of 2, perfect for gifting or keeping one for yourself.
seo_title: Crystal Infused Two-Tone Pyrite & Obsidian Bracelet
seo_description: Dainty two-tone bar-link bracelet with natural Pyrite & Black Obsidian crystal beads. Adjustable lobster clasp, skin-friendly. Pack of 2 for ₹499.

metafields.highlights: Two-tone gold & silver bar-link chain · Natural Pyrite & Black Obsidian crystal beads · Secure lobster clasp with adjustable extender · Lightweight, skin-friendly, everyday wear
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Gold-tone and silver-tone plated brass bar-link chain; natural Pyrite and Black Obsidian stone beads; lobster clasp with extender chain.
metafields.care_or_directions: Keep away from water, perfume and sweat to preserve the plating. Wipe gently with a soft dry cloth after wear and store in a pouch or box away from other jewellery.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: Are the Pyrite and Black Obsidian beads real crystals?
faqs.a: Yes. Each bracelet is strung with natural Pyrite and Black Obsidian stone beads, so slight variation in colour and pattern from piece to piece is normal and confirms they are genuine.
Yes. It closes with a secure lobster clasp and has an extender chain, so it fits most wrist sizes comfortably.
The gold-tone and silver-tone plating stays bright with a little care — keep it away from water, perfume and sweat, and wipe it dry after wearing.

faqs.q: Can I wear it every day?
faqs.a: Absolutely. It is lightweight and skin-friendly, made to sit close to the wrist for comfortable all-day wear.

faqs.q: Does it work as a gift?
faqs.a: Yes — the Pack of 2 option is a favourite for gifting, so you can keep one and share the other.

page_blocks.subtitle: Two-Tone Shine | Real Crystal Beads | Everyday Comfort
page_blocks.product_brief: A dainty gold-and-silver bar-link bracelet hand-set with natural Pyrite and Black Obsidian beads. It layers effortlessly, sits light on the wrist and carries a quiet dose of grounding crystal energy — made for everyday wear.
page_blocks.what_we_put_in:
✦ Pyrite bead – warm golden shine long linked to confidence and abundance
✦ Black Obsidian bead – deep glassy stone loved for grounding, protective energy
✦ Gold-tone bar links – add a soft warm glow to the chain
✦ Silver-tone bar links – balance the gold for a versatile two-tone look
✦ Lobster clasp & extender – secure closure with an adjustable, comfortable fit
page_blocks.product_benefits:
✨ Meaningful everyday piece
Real Pyrite and Black Obsidian beads bring intention to a bracelet you can wear daily.
✨ Goes with everything
The two-tone chain pairs with both your gold and silver jewellery.
✨ Effortless layering
Slim and low-profile, it stacks neatly with watches and other bracelets.
✨ All-day comfort
Lightweight and skin-friendly, so you barely notice it is on.
✨ Adjustable fit
Secure lobster clasp and extender chain fit most wrist sizes.
page_blocks.product_details:
Plating: Gold-tone & Silver-tone (two-tone)
Base Metal: Plated brass
Beads: Natural Pyrite & Black Obsidian
Colour: Gold, Silver, Golden-grey & Black
Finish: Crystal Infused
Clasp: Lobster with extender chain
detail_points: ✨ Two-tone gold & silver bar-link chain in one bracelet
🪨 Hand-set natural Pyrite & Black Obsidian crystal beads
🔒 Secure lobster clasp with adjustable extender
page_blocks.product_specification:
Product Name: Crystal Infused Two-Tone Bracelet with Pyrite & Black Obsidian
Design: Two-tone bar-link chain with crystal beads
Material: Gold-tone & silver-tone plated brass, natural Pyrite & Black Obsidian beads
Net Quantity: 1 bracelet (Pack of 2 option available)
Country of Origin: India
page_blocks.how_to_use:
1. Wrap the bracelet around your wrist and fasten the lobster clasp.
2. Use the extender chain to set a comfortable, snug fit.
3. Wear solo or stack with watches and other bracelets.
4. Wipe dry after wear and store in a pouch to keep the shine.
